Germline-somatic interaction - Figure 2

Anton Safonov, Luca Boscolo Bielo, David N Brown

30 December, 2025


Figure 2a:


Figure 2b: 


## Call:
## coxph(formula = Surv(time.months, event) ~ B2 + ET_partner, data = cdk_b2_1)
## 
##   n= 977, number of events= 682 
## 
##                          coef exp(coef) se(coef)     z Pr(>|z|)    
## B2                    0.77693   2.17478  0.15745 4.934 8.04e-07 ***
## ET_partnerFulvestrant 0.52327   1.68754  0.08238 6.352 2.12e-10 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
##                       exp(coef) exp(-coef) lower .95 upper .95
## B2                        2.175     0.4598     1.597     2.961
## ET_partnerFulvestrant     1.688     0.5926     1.436     1.983
## 
## Concordance= 0.584  (se = 0.01 )
## Likelihood ratio test= 58.6  on 2 df,   p=2e-13
## Wald test            = 66.47  on 2 df,   p=4e-15
## Score (logrank) test = 68.8  on 2 df,   p=1e-15
## Call:
## coxph(formula = Surv(time.months, event) ~ B2 + ET_partner + 
##     Tx.Line.c, data = cdk_b2_all)
## 
##   n= 1750, number of events= 1284 
## 
##                          coef exp(coef) se(coef)      z Pr(>|z|)    
## B2                    0.67938   1.97265  0.12251  5.545 2.93e-08 ***
## ET_partnerFulvestrant 0.26585   1.30453  0.06003  4.429 9.48e-06 ***
## Tx.Line.c2to3         0.30154   1.35194  0.06746  4.470 7.81e-06 ***
## Tx.Line.c4to5         0.61297   1.84590  0.10017  6.119 9.41e-10 ***
## Tx.Line.c6+           1.17507   3.23837  0.10774 10.906  < 2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
##                       exp(coef) exp(-coef) lower .95 upper .95
## B2                        1.973     0.5069     1.552     2.508
## ET_partnerFulvestrant     1.305     0.7666     1.160     1.467
## Tx.Line.c2to3             1.352     0.7397     1.185     1.543
## Tx.Line.c4to5             1.846     0.5417     1.517     2.246
## Tx.Line.c6+               3.238     0.3088     2.622     4.000
## 
## Concordance= 0.625  (se = 0.008 )
## Likelihood ratio test= 187.7  on 5 df,   p=<2e-16
## Wald test            = 219  on 5 df,   p=<2e-16
## Score (logrank) test = 232.8  on 5 df,   p=<2e-16

Figure 2d: 

## Call:
## coxph(formula = Surv(time, event) ~ Tx.Type + strata(index), 
##     data = .)
## 
##   n= 82, number of events= 79 
## 
##                coef exp(coef) se(coef)      z Pr(>|z|)   
## Tx.Typeparp -0.9694    0.3793   0.3541 -2.738  0.00619 **
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
##             exp(coef) exp(-coef) lower .95 upper .95
## Tx.Typeparp    0.3793      2.636    0.1895    0.7593
## 
## Concordance= 0.725  (se = 0.1 )
## Likelihood ratio test= 8.4  on 1 df,   p=0.004
## Wald test            = 7.49  on 1 df,   p=0.006
## Score (logrank) test = 8.1  on 1 df,   p=0.004
## 
##  Two-sided Fisher's Exact Test (usual method using minimum likelihood)
## 
## data:  .
## p-value = 2.388e-05
## alternative hypothesis: true odds ratio is not equal to 1
## 95 percent confidence interval:
##   2.8406 27.9813
## sample estimates:
## odds ratio 
##    8.87139

Figure 2g: 


## 
##  Two-sided Fisher's Exact Test (usual method using minimum likelihood)
## 
## data:  matrix(c(b2.acq, dim(b2.pw)[1] - b2.acq, wt.acq, dim(wt.pw)[1] -     wt.acq), nrow = 2)
## p-value = 0.00101
## alternative hypothesis: true odds ratio is not equal to 1
## 95 percent confidence interval:
##   2.0697 13.0121
## sample estimates:
## odds ratio
